ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Responses are contextually relevant and maintain persona consistency but could improve naturalness in delivery for a more engaging dialogue.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>The response lacks direct relevance to the dynamic context, though it maintains persona consistency and has good naturalness in delivery. Overall quality is average due to missing connection with immediate concerns raised by Player Input.
"Maintains persona, provides a measured response fitting scholarly role and context."
